---
title: "Catharina Boevey"
---

## Catharina Boevey

**Dates:** 1670-1726

**Maiden name:** (Riches)

### Description

philanthropist

### Biography

She was connected by marriage to the Crawley family, to which CMY\'s paternal grandmother belonged.

### Letters

- Letter from March 31st [1897?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
